resultList.dtldesc: Discover an inviting 2 BHK flat for sale in the vibrant locale of DRA Centralia, Navalur, Chennai. Perfectly blending comfort and convenience, this unfurnished residence promises a modern lifestyle amidst urban sophistication.::::::Property Specifications::::::Step into this 984 sqft super built-up area flat, perched on the 7th floor of a 14-floor building, and be greeted by a spacious living cum dining area, perfect for hosting memorable gatherings and creating cherished moments. The kitchen, designed for both functionality and style, includes a utility area for added convenience. ::::::The property showcases elegant vitrified tile flooring, adding a touch of sophistication and easy maintenance to the interior space. Furthermore, with its Vastu compliant and east-facing orientation, this apartment promises a harmonious living space filled with an abundance of natural light, creating an inviting and uplifting ambiance.::::::Facilities::::::Enjoy the convenience of covered parking, round-the-clock water supply from both borewell and corporation sources, and 100% power backup. The premises are protected by vigilant security guards and CCTV surveillance, while access to all the floors is effortless with three available lifts. Additional amenities include a gymnasium, earthquake-resistant features, a multipurpose mall, solar energy utilization, a kids play area, and a badminton court, ensuring a well-rounded offering to meet diverse lifestyle needs with finesse.::::::Locality::::::Conveniently located near Navalur Junction, this area boasts proximity to essential facilities and OMR. Schools within 300m ensure an easy commute for students, while nearby hospitals within 500m provide accessible healthcare services. Malls and supermarkets are within a 2 km radius, offering shopping and entertainment options. Public transport options such as buses and autos are readily available, and the metro station is just 1 km away, enhancing connectivity for daily commuters. Plus, banks and ATMs are conveniently located nearby, ensuring financial convenience. ::::::Embrace urban living at its finest with this remarkable offering. Call today!::
